sections.title: Household as a system
sections.body: A household is not a list of tasks. It is a system of people, time, responsibilities, resources, obligations, and logistics.

sections.title: State over tasks
sections.body: DomusMind stores household facts and state. Tasks emerge from state transitions and responsibilities.

sections.title: Shared operational memory
sections.body: Information should not live in one person’s head. DomusMind creates shared visibility across the family.

sections.title: Anticipation over reaction
sections.body: The platform supports planning across time horizons and detects upcoming obligations before they become urgent.

sections.title: Explicit responsibilities
sections.body: Responsibility domains define ownership with primary and secondary members to reduce single points of failure.

sections.title: Frictionless capture
sections.body: Capture must be easier than remembering: quick input, integrations, and APIs become first-class pathways.

sections.title: Privacy and ownership
sections.body: Household data is private family infrastructure. DomusMind prioritizes data ownership, strong access controls, and self-hosting options.
